props.ChoiceText: You were called to shoot for rank and spectacle, where noble amusement mattered as much as the kill and your station stayed plain however well you performed.
props.ChoiceBio: A display hunt for the great taught you that martial skill can be admired without ever being allowed to belong.

0.TransitionText: Because a noble hunt taught you that skill near rank can win notice without ever making you one of the noticed, bow, distance, and patience remained the shape of your life.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Archer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a noble hunt taught you that skill near rank can win notice without ever making you one of the noticed, your skill with the bow opened a different road.
1.TransitionPrompt: Your performance before rank has opened a path toward courtlier service. Will you follow it?
